title: ligularia biceps
intro: Ligularia biceps, also known as Ligularia, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is native to East Asia and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and promoting digestive health. Ligularia biceps can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to promote overall well-being.
